regional_cost_note: Bricklayers in New Plymouth typically charge $125–$190/m² for single-skin brickwork, $115–$170/m² for blockwork, and $210–$420/m² for heritage restoration. Taranaki rates are typically 5–10% below the national average. Brick is less common in NZ new builds but remains popular for retaining walls, paving, and heritage restoration.
